search_document:
User Request: Products by supplier.

Dashboard Components:
Title: Products by Supplier
Type: bar_chart
Description: Distribution of products across different suppliers
Title: Supplier Performance
Type: table
Description: List of suppliers with total products supplied
Title: Total Products
Type: kpi
Description: Overall count of products available

sql_queries.title: Products by Supplier
sql_queries.description: Distribution of products across different suppliers
sql_queries.sql: SELECT s.CompanyName, COUNT(p.ProductID) AS ProductCount FROM Suppliers s JOIN Products p ON s.SupplierID = p.SupplierID GROUP BY s.CompanyName

sql_queries.title: Supplier Performance
sql_queries.description: List of suppliers with total products supplied
sql_queries.sql: SELECT s.CompanyName, COUNT(p.ProductID) AS TotalProducts FROM Suppliers s JOIN Products p ON s.SupplierID = p.SupplierID GROUP BY s.CompanyName

sql_queries.title: Total Products
sql_queries.sql: SELECT COUNT(ProductID) AS TotalProducts FROM Products
